temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dimly lit car at night, a man in a black t-shirt, Ah Qiang, recounts a story to his companion. He explains that someone asked him how long he had been with him, and he couldn't remember. His companion, a man with long hair, listens intently, his face illuminated by the faint light from outside. (Storyline: The scene opens on a conversation between two friends, establishing a reflective and slightly somber mood. Ah Qiang is sharing an anecdote about his loyalty and memory, hinting at a significant past event.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Reflective, slightly weary. 2) Background sounds or music: The low hum of the car engine.)
(00:04-00:08) The camera shifts focus to the companion, who has long hair and is wearing a white glove on his right hand. He listens to Ah Qiang's story with a serious, contemplative expression, his face partially obscured by shadows. (Storyline: This shot establishes the companion as a listener, absorbing Ah Qiang's story. His serious expression suggests he is deeply engaged with what he's hearing, creating a sense of intimacy and shared history.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Ah Qiang's tone is dismissive and a bit exasperated. 2) Background sounds or music: The ambient sound of the car continues.)
